title: Adopt 2-commit squash pattern + insight categorization with auto-enforced doc updates
goal: Solve two coupled problems: (1) post-merge metadata in single squash commit prevents auto-cleanup of own task branch — fixed by splitting into pure-squash + post-completion 2-commit pattern; (2) insights captured in logs/insights.jsonl are easy to forget — fixed by classifying each insight and forcing doc updates for high-impact categories before TASK_COMPLETED is allowed. Apply both retroactively by classifying INS-20260428-006-03 as a gotcha and embedding the warning into git-branch-policy.md as the first living example.

include: scripts/check-completion-gates.mjs (new gate: actionable_doc_change/gotcha must have applied_to_doc.status=applied)
logs/insights.jsonl (amendment entry for INS-20260428-006-03 with category=gotcha + applied_to_doc reference)
CURRENT_STATE.md (authority doc versions, last update, active task)
task ledger, session log, report, quality score
exclude: Other authority documents not directly related

success_criteria: git-branch-policy.md Squash Merge 운영 순서 절이 2-commit pattern을 표준으로 명시 (pure squash commit + separate post-completion record commit). Legacy 1-commit pattern은 deprecated 표기.
git-branch-policy.md에 INS-20260428-006-03 기반 ⚠ Known gotcha 줄이 추가됨 (살아있는 예시).
work-history-policy.md insight_capture 절이 4개 category(actionable_doc_change, gotcha, proposal, observation)와 각각의 처리 규칙, applied_to_doc 필드를 정의함.
scripts/check-completion-gates.mjs가 actionable_doc_change/gotcha 분류된 인사이트에 applied_to_doc.status=applied가 없으면 TASK_COMPLETED를 차단함.
logs/insights.jsonl에 INS-20260428-006-03을 category=gotcha + applied_to_doc=applied로 보강한 amendment 엔트리가 append됨.
이 Task에서 새로 추가하는 INS 엔트리 1건 이상이 새 schema(category + applied_to_doc)를 따르며 자기-검증함.
CURRENT_STATE.md 권위 문서 표가 git-branch-policy.md v1.9, work-history-policy.md v1.x로 갱신됨.
TASK-20260429-001 ledger에 TASK_CREATED, GENERATION_COMPLETED, VALIDATION_RESULT, MERGE_COMPLETED, REPORT_WRITTEN, TASK_COMPLETED with insight_capture 기록.
reports/TASK-20260429-001.md (Tier 2 형식, Executive Summary 포함) 작성.
npm run audit:harness PASS (새 게이트 포함).
task/TASK-20260429-001 자체가 새 2-commit 패턴 적용 후 npm run clean:branches -- --force로 자동 정리됨 (검증).

positive: Categories must be enumerable: actionable_doc_change, gotcha, proposal, observation.
Amendment entry for INS-20260428-006-03 must reference the original id explicitly.
New gate must apply only to insights captured in the same Task (matched by source_task field).
negative: Do not include secrets, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not modify the original INS-20260428-006-03 entry in place (append-only ledger principle).
Do not make the new gate so strict that it blocks legitimate Tasks with no insights.
